standard.rawManifest:
---
# Source: test-uuid/templates/uuid-test.yaml
# Test: UUID function - test if uuidv4 works
# KICS_HELM_ID_1:
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: kics-helm-uuid-test
data:
  # Test: uuidv4 - generates a random UUID v4
  uuidv4Value: "0271591b-1e7e-4359-a277-125e3719ace3"

splitManifests.content:
# Source: test-uuid/templates/uuid-test.yaml
# Test: UUID function - test if uuidv4 works
# KICS_HELM_ID_1:
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: kics-helm-uuid-test
data:
  # Test: uuidv4 - generates a random UUID v4
  uuidv4Value: "0271591b-1e7e-4359-a277-125e3719ace3"
splitManifests.originalContent:
# Test: UUID function - test if uuidv4 works
# KICS_HELM_ID_1:
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: {{ .Release.Name }}-uuid-test
data:
  # Test: uuidv4 - generates a random UUID v4
  {{- if .Values.testUuidv4 }}
  uuidv4Value: {{ uuidv4 | quote }}
  {{- end }}
